$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for what the public build may contain. The ONLY approved content basis is commandforgeai-public-safe-site-content-basis.md. Any route not listed here fails the build. Pricing stays gated behind intake until Lionel explicitly approves public pricing.

routes.content: course detail pages (descriptions only, pricing gated)
Privacy Policy (public-safe; counsel-reviewed draft, bracketed placeholders for entity/jurisdiction)
Terms of Service (public-safe; counsel-reviewed draft, bracketed placeholders for entity/jurisdiction/liability-cap)
